title: Coyote
director: Joaquín Luis Romero Marchent, Fernando Soler
writer: Pedro Chamorro, Jesús Franco, José Mallorquí
actors: Abel Salazar, Gloria Marín, Manuel Monroy
plot: In 1848 the USA annex California, Hispanics are now discriminated by the Yankees. To end the abuse Don César orders his student son to return from Europe. The locals laugh about this ridiculous dandy. But all is not what it seems.
